message:
fix: clippy derive lint fixes + import placement in unix VFS

ssi_abort_policy.rs:
- Add #[allow(clippy::derive_partial_eq_without_eq)] to LossMatrix since
  f64 does not implement Eq
- Add Eq to TxnCost derive since all its fields support Eq

unix.rs:
- Move `use std::fmt::Write as _` above the early-return guard in
  debug_dump_sqlite_wal_files to avoid unused-import lint when the guard
  triggers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
